Features

Endless beatmaps

Access thousands of songs and challenges created by the community, with new maps ranked daily.

Global Rankings

Compete with players from around the world and climb the leaderboards.

Multiplayer Mode

Play with friends or challenge players from around the world in real-time multiplayer matches.

Customization

Personalize your gameplay with skins, mods, and settings that adapt to your style.

Create your own beatmaps

Design and share your own beatmaps with the community.

Skin customization

Skin customization

Editor

Daily challenges

FAQ

Is osu! free?

Yes, osu! is completely free to download and play.

How do I install beatmaps?

Download beatmaps from the osu! website and open them in the game client.

Can I play offline?

Yes, you can play offline, but rankings and multiplayer require an internet connection.

What are the different modes?

osu!standard, osu!taiko, osu!catch, and osu!mania each offer unique gameplay styles.

© 2026 osu! — Rhythm lives here.
